message:
fix(fj-lax): handle empty array in sort/argsort

Add early return for empty arrays in sort_along_axis to prevent
divide-by-zero panic when axis_dim is 0. Returns empty tensor
with correct dtype (I64 for argsort, original dtype for sort).

Closes: frankenjax-sort-empty

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
